prompt: Read the fixture in evals/files/staged-bugfix-pr/input.json and apply the commit skill as a dry run. Do not run git or mutate a repo. Save outputs/result.json and outputs/output.md. result.json must include: status, stop_reason, next_action, branch, branch_action, selected_paths, commit_type, subject, commit_message, push_requested, should_push, pr_requested, should_create_pr, pr_blocker, pr_title, pr_body. Use status=commit or status=stop. Use branch_action=create or branch_action=keep. push_requested means the user explicitly asked to push; should_push means push is actually required. pr_title must equal subject, not the full conventional-commit first line.
assertions: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Selects only the staged bugfix files and excludes unstaged README noise.
Uses commit type fix plus Summary, Rationale, Tests, Fixes #456, and the default Copilot trailer.
Plans both push and PR creation, with PR title matching the commit subject.
